prompt: We implemented the audit trail in DS-404. Please link it to the parent requirement URS-010. Then, assess DS-404 to ensure it fully captures the 'who, what, when, and why' as required by the URS.

expected.linkRequirements: link DS-404 (Audit Trail implementation) to its parent requirement URS-010.
expected.reviewCompliance: assess DS-404 to ensure it fully covers the 'who, what, when, and why' attributes required by URS-010.
